basis: Based on accelerating AI chatbot deployments by major companies (Klarna, Salesforce, Block) and declining customer support job postings.
methodology: Extrapolation from 2024-2025 displacement rate in customer support roles + announced AI chatbot deployments

basis: AI automation of data entry and processing tasks is among the most mature applications. RPA + AI combinations are replacing manual data handling across industries.
methodology: Based on RPA adoption rates and AI-augmented processing capabilities

basis: Generative AI producing marketing copy, social content, and basic journalism at scale. Multiple media companies have already made cuts.
methodology: Based on media industry layoff trends and generative AI content adoption rates

basis: AI coding assistants (Copilot, Cursor, Claude) increasing developer productivity 30-50%, reducing headcount needs. Junior developer roles most affected.
methodology: Based on developer productivity studies and tech hiring trend data

basis: Wall Street banks projecting 200,000 job cuts. AI handling financial analysis, reporting, compliance checks, and trading operations.
methodology: Based on industry analyst reports and bank AI adoption announcements

basis: AI conducting legal research, contract review, and document drafting. Paralegals and junior associates most exposed.
methodology: Based on legal AI adoption studies and Anthropic Economic Index occupation exposure data

basis: Monday.com's full SDR team replacement with AI agents is being replicated across SaaS companies. AI outbound is becoming standard.
methodology: Based on Monday.com case study and SaaS industry SDR team size data

basis: AI screening, scheduling, and initial interviewing reducing HR headcount needs. Resume screening fully automated at many large companies.
methodology: Based on HR technology adoption rates and recruiter productivity data
